{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Enkai's technique
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Enkai uses a technique that releases sixteen balls of fire trailing eight sparks each.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
